content:
## Agenda

The HM Management Weekly Meeting is organized by you, Rami Khouri. The meeting will cover ongoing management topics, updates, and any pressing issues that need to be addressed within the team. It serves as a platform for discussing operational strategies, reviewing progress, and aligning on future actions.

## Participants

The meeting will include Anan Swaid, who has accepted the invitation, and Eleanor Khateeb, who has also accepted. Elias Jahjah and Shira Lachmann have declined the invitation, while Ori from HealthyMind has not yet responded.

## Helpful Context

In recent communications, there have been discussions about various operational aspects such as the integration of new protocols in clinics, updates on children and youth clinics, and the handling of administrative tasks. Eleanor Khateeb has been involved in discussions about clinical management and operational improvements, which might be relevant to this meeting. Additionally, there have been updates on the transition of patients between different services and the implementation of new procedures in the clinics.
